name: JRC MAES - Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services
dataType: Ecosystem condition, pollination potential, water purification, carbon sequestration, recreation services
description: EU-wide ecosystem assessment under the Biodiversity Strategy, providing raster and vector maps of ecosystem types, condition indicators and service flows across all EU member states.

name: JRC LUISA Territorial Modelling Platform
dataType: Land use projections, population distribution, urban growth, green infrastructure indicators
description: Activity-based spatial model simulating population and land use at 100 m resolution across the EU, producing baseline and policy scenarios for territorial impact assessment up to 2050.

name: JRC PESETA - Climate Change Impacts in Europe
dataType: Climate damage estimates for floods, droughts, agriculture, energy, health, coasts, forest fires
description: Sectoral and regional assessment of climate change economic impacts across Europe covering ten impact categories including agriculture, floods, droughts and human health under multiple warming scenarios.

name: EFAS - European Flood Awareness System
dataType: Flood forecasts, streamflow, soil moisture, snow water equivalent, flash flood indicators
description: Operational pan-European flood forecasting system providing probabilistic medium-range flood forecasts, flash flood indicators and seasonal streamflow outlooks to national hydrological services.

name: EFFIS - European Forest Fire Information System
dataType: Active fire detections, burnt areas, fire danger forecasts, fire weather indices, fire statistics
description: Pan-European wildfire monitoring covering the full fire cycle from pre-fire danger indices to post-fire damage assessment, with a database of nearly 2 million fire records from 22 countries.

name: EDO - European Drought Observatory
operator: European Commission Joint Research Centre / Copernicus EMS
dataType: Drought indicators (SPI, soil moisture anomaly, fAPAR anomaly), Combined Drought Indicator
description: Operational drought monitoring service providing near-real-time indicator maps, trend analysis and early warnings for droughts across the European continent.

name: Copernicus EMS On-Demand Mapping (Rapid & Risk/Recovery)
operator: Copernicus Emergency Management Service / EC DG JRC
dataType: Pre/post-event reference maps, delineation maps, grading maps, damage assessment
description: On-demand satellite-based emergency mapping service providing rapid damage assessment and risk maps for natural and man-made disasters worldwide, with a public activation archive.

name: Copernicus HRL Small Woody Features
operator: European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service
dataType: Linear woody structures (hedgerows) and patchy woody features (200-5000 m2)
description: Pan-European mapping of hedgerows, tree lines and small woody patches from VHR imagery at 5 m resolution across all EEA-39 countries, supporting biodiversity and landscape connectivity assessments.

name: Copernicus HRL Grassland
operator: European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service
dataType: Binary grassland/non-grassland mask, ploughing indicator, change layers
description: Pan-European grassland extent product at 10 m resolution with change detection, covering EEA-39 countries and supporting CAP monitoring, biodiversity and land use change assessments.

name: Copernicus HRL Water and Wetness
operator: European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service
dataType: Permanent water, temporary wet areas, wetness probability
description: Pan-European high-resolution layer mapping permanent and temporary water bodies and wet surfaces across EEA-39 countries, derived from multi-temporal satellite imagery.

name: EEA Noise Data - Environmental Noise Directive (END)
dataType: Noise exposure maps (roads, railways, airports, industry), population exposure estimates by dB bands
description: Strategic noise maps and population exposure data reported by EU member states under the Environmental Noise Directive, covering road, rail, airport and industrial noise sources across European agglomerations.

name: WISE Water Framework Directive Database
dataType: Water body status (ecological, chemical), pressures, River Basin Management Plans, spatial delineations
description: Comprehensive database of surface and groundwater body status, pressures and measures reported under the EU Water Framework Directive, covering all EU member states with spatial river basin delineations.

name: ECDC Surveillance Atlas of Infectious Diseases
operator: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
dataType: Infectious disease case counts, incidence rates, antimicrobial resistance by country and year
description: Interactive atlas providing surveillance data on over 50 infectious diseases across EU/EEA countries, with temporal trends, geographic distribution maps and exportable tables.

name: Eurostat Urban Audit / Cities and Functional Urban Areas (GISCO)
dataType: City boundaries, Functional Urban Areas, demographic/economic/transport/environment indicators for ~800 cities
description: Geodata and about 60 statistical indicators for approximately 800 European cities and their functional urban areas, enabling cross-city comparison on demography, economy, transport and environment.

name: Urban Data Platform Plus (UDPplus)
dataType: Urban indicators (demography, economy, transport, environment, social), city profiles, territorial dashboards
description: JRC and DG REGIO interactive portal providing statistical and modelled indicators at urban level for about 800 European cities, supporting the Urban Agenda and Cohesion Policy.

name: EUROCONTROL Aviation Data and Intelligence
dataType: Air traffic demand, flight trajectories, airspace structure, emissions, performance metrics
description: Pan-European aviation data covering air traffic demand, flight movements, airspace usage, CO2 emissions and ATM performance from the European air traffic management organization.

name: TENtec - Trans-European Transport Network Information System
dataType: TEN-T core/comprehensive network (roads, railways, ports, airports, inland waterways), European Transport Corridors
description: Information system and interactive map viewer for the Trans-European Transport Network, showing core and comprehensive network corridors for road, rail, waterway, port and airport infrastructure.

name: eLTER DEIMS-SDR - Long-Term Ecosystem Research Site Registry
dataType: Research site metadata, ecosystem monitoring parameters, site locations, networks, associated datasets
description: Global site and dataset registry for long-term ecosystem research, hosting metadata for approximately 250 European research sites and platforms with information on measured parameters, ecosystems and associated datasets.

name: AnaEE - Analysis and Experimentation on Ecosystems Data Portal
dataType: Experimental ecosystem data, climate manipulation experiments, biodiversity experiments, mesocosm data
description: Pan-European research infrastructure data portal providing access to experimental ecosystem data from climate change manipulation, biodiversity and land-use experiments across European facilities.

name: DANUBIUS-RI - International Centre for Advanced Studies on River-Sea Systems
dataType: River catchment data, estuarine/delta observations, coastal sea measurements, water quality, sediment transport
description: Pan-European distributed research infrastructure for integrated studies of rivers, estuaries, deltas and coastal seas, with a central data centre aggregating observations from Supersites across seven countries.

name: IS-ENES / ENES Portal - European Network for Earth System Modelling
operator: European Network for Earth System Modelling (ENES)
dataType: Climate model outputs (CMIP5/CMIP6), model documentation, software tools, simulation metadata
description: European hub for the Earth System Grid Federation providing access to CMIP climate model simulation data from seven major European climate modelling centres, with model documentation and evaluation tools.
